title: Customize My Work

posts.author: Solene (Lchd)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Hello,
My work is a great view to synthetize all the tasks at one place. However, we can hardly get the needed info as it is not flexible at all. For instance, to manage my overall workload, coming from several different projects, it is very difficult and we need to create costumized and difficult dashboards on top.

What are you trying to achieve

Could we add some columns in My Work, especially the column Workload ?
